gist.headline: Pair programming in the greenhouse
gist.blurb: OptiCode just sprouted in the community showcase. It's an AI-powered collaborative coding platform for real-time pair programming, because sometimes you need a second pair of eyes (or compound eyes) on your code.
gist.summary: Added OptiCode, an AI-powered collaborative coding platform, to the community apps showcase.
gist.impact: Developers can now discover OptiCode in the greenhouse to practice real-time pair programming and level up their skills.
gist.visual_concept: OptiCode is about collaborative coding and learning. Visual: The pollinations bee (Polly) and the Monitor Robot sitting together at a retro computer terminal, pair programming. Code sprouting from a lime green pot nearby. Cozy greenhouse vibes.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-headed robot sitting together at a retro computer terminal, happily pair programming. A small code-plant sprouts from a lime green (#ecf874) flower pot on the desk. Soft pastel gradient background with warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
